flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Fort Scott Community College fell 30% between 2021 and 2024 (990 → 693).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 25% at Fort Scott Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (763 vs 1.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Fort Scott Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.1k → $3.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Fort Scott Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.0% → 0.0%).
